title: Adidas Football
description: Football boot customization at the Adidas flagship store in Moscow. Live painting of football footwear with a unique design for every customer.

details.task: Set up football boot customization at the Adidas flagship store in Moscow.
details.solution: We deployed a custom station inside the store. Artists hand-painted customers' boots with individual designs in the brand's aesthetic.
details.result: Over 80 pairs of custom boots in 3 days. The activation received strong customer engagement and reinforced the flagship's positioning.
